Warrant Fees format is not 999999.00 .
Warrant Fees are less than zero.

First 4 and last 3 characters of File Name must be numeric.
File Name already exists.
File Sequence Number must be numeric.

Last Record displayed.
Number of records must be in range 1 to 99999
Number Of Records is not numeric.
Number Of Records is not a whole number.
Number of records cannot be Zero.

Date To Operations is in the future.
Date To Operations earlier than Date Received.
Query Cancelled.
Tape File(s) must be added before saving the Tape.
The value does not conform to a valid date format of DD-MON-YYYY.
Currency amounts must be in the format of 0.00
This court is not in service
Please enter a court from the list
Invalid value for Hearing Type
Date must be a weekday
Date must be a working day
Value must be greater than 0
Maximum amount claimed is 99,999,999.99
Maximum fee for this case type is XXX
Maximum solicitors costs is 9,999.99
This date cannot be in the future
This date is more than one month in the past
Please enter Date of Issue
Issue Date may not be before Date Request Received
Date of Service may not be before Issue Date
That party is already assigned to the case. Please select another.

The telephone number entered is not in the correct format
The fax number entered is not in the correct format
Time must be in the format hh:mi e.g. 13:00
Value must be greater than 0
Allowed hours must be greater than 0 and less than 1000
Allowed minutes must be between 0 and 59
You must enter at least one of: Case Number, Party Name, Address 1
You must enter at least one of: CO Number, Party Name, Address 1, Employer Name
You must enter at least one of: Case Number, Party Name, Address 1, Employer Name
No results were found for the given search criteria.
The number of results for the search is greater than nnn. Do you wish to continue?

This coded party does not exist.
There was a problem retrieving the list of Hearings for the specified case.
This code is already in use, please re-enter.
National Coded Parties can only be created by Helpdesk.
National Coded Parties can only be maintained by Helpdesk.
National Coded Parties may not be deleted.
Cannot delete CODED_PARTIES while CASES exist.
Cannot delete CODED_PARTIES while WARRANTS exist.

Start Date cannot be earlier than today's date
Start Date must be before End Date
End Date must be equal to or later than Start Date
Estimated Days must be greater than 0 or blank
Estimated Time - Hours must be 5 or less
Estimated Time - Minutes must be less than 60
You have entered an invalid value - please re-enter
Case Management Conference Date cannot be earlier than today's date
